categories.label: Arrival Bonus
categories.description: Credits earned based on order of arrival at destination (varies by round)

categories.label: Best-Looking Ship Bonus
categories.description: Bonus credits for fewest exposed connectors

categories.label: Goods Sold
categories.description: Credits from selling cargo (yellow=1, green=2, blue=3, red=4)

categories.label: Adventure Credits
categories.description: Credits earned from abandoned ships, defeated enemies, etc.

categories.label: Lost Components
categories.description: Lose 1 credit per component lost (up to round maximum)
